Article Title: FIFA World Cup 2026 : All you need to know about dates, cities, venues and $ 727 million prize money
Article Text:
FIFA World Cup 2026 trophy (PTI Photo)

FIFA Shuts Down Trump's 2026 World Cup 'Unsafe Cities' Threat With Bold Remark

When is the 2026 FIFA World Cup ?

Host Cities & Stadiums

United States (11 cities)

Mexico (3 Cities)

Canada (2 Cities)

New Tournament Format (48 Teams)

Prize Money Distribution of the 2026 FIFA World Cup

A Historic Tournament Ahead

The biggest tournament of Football FIFA World Cup 2026 is set to start from June and for the first ever, the tournament will be hosted by three countries: United States, Canada and Mexico. The matches will played across 16 cities with an expanded 48-team format, making it the largest World Cup ever staged.Here is everything you need to know about the dates, host cities, venues, and tournament format.The tournament will take place from June 11 to July 19, 2026, returning to the traditional summer schedule after the winter World Cup in Qatar in 2022.Opening match: June 11, 2026Final: July 19, 2026Total duration: 39 daysTotal matches: 104Teams participating: 48The 2026 FIFA World Cup opening match is scheduled for Thursday, June 11, 2026, featuring host nation Mexico against South Africa at the Estadio Azteca (Mexico City Stadium) in Mexico City.A total of 16 cities across North America will host matches during the tournament. These cities will stage all 104 matches of the expanded World Cup.▪︎ AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas▪︎ GEHA Field at Arrowhead Stadium in Kansas City, Missouri▪︎ Gillette Stadium in Foxborough, Massachusetts▪︎ Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens, Florida▪︎ Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara, California▪︎ Lincoln Financial Field in Philadelphia▪︎ Lumen Field in Seattle▪︎ Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta▪︎ MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey▪︎ NRG Stadium in Houston▪︎ SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California▪︎ Estadio Akron in Zapopan, Jalisco, Mexico▪︎ Estadio Banorte in Mexico City▪︎ Estadio BBVA in Guadalupe, Nuevo León, Mexico▪︎ BC Place in Vancouver, British Columbia▪︎ BMO Field in TorontoThe 2026 edition will introduce a new expanded format of 48 teams instead of 32.12 groups of 4 teams each in which top two teams from each group and eight best third-placed teams will advance to knockout stage. Teams will compete with round of 32, round of 16, quarterfinals and semifinals - before reaching the World Cup final.The total prize pool for the tournament stands at 727 million Dollar (approximately Rs 6,68,840,000,000 or Rs 66,884 crore), making it the most lucrative FIFA World Cup in history.The prize money is divided into three main sections:1. Performance-based distribution: $655 million will be distributed among the participating teams based on their performance in the tournament. In Indian currency, this amounts to roughly Rs 60,260 crore.2. Winner’s Prize: The national association of the champion team will receive $50 million. This equals approximately Rs 460 crore, the highest winner’s prize in FIFA World Cup history.3. Runner-up Prize: The second-place team will earn $33 million, which is around Rs 304 crore.With an increased number of teams, matches, and host cities, the 2026 FIFA World Cup promises to be one of the most ambitious sporting events ever organized. The joint hosting by USA, Canada, and Mexico is expected to bring football fans from around the world to North America for a month-long celebration of the sport.
Article Summary: The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be hosted by three countries: United States, Canada and Mexico. The tournament will take place from June 11 to July 19, 2026, returning to the traditional summer schedule after the winter World Cup in Qatar in 2022. The 2026 edition will introduce a new expanded format of 48 teams instead of 32.

Article Title: Europa League: Nottingham Forest lose, Aston Villa win as key European matches deliver drama
Article Text:
Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins celebrates after scoring (AP Photo)



For the complete match list, venues, and timings, check the full

For the complete match list, venues, and timings, check the full IPL 2026 schedule , fixtures, and team-wise match dates here.

Nottingham Forest suffered a surprise 1-0 loss to Midtjylland in the Europa League last-16 first leg on Thursday, while Aston Villa’s Ollie Watkins ended his goal drought by scoring in a 1-0 win at Lille.Forest were hurt by Cho Gue-sung’s late header at the City Ground, giving the Danish side their second win over Forest this season.Earlier, Forest had lost 3-2 at home to Midtjylland in the group stage in October, during a season when Ange Postecoglou was one of four managers. The Premier League side must now secure an away win on March 19 to stay in the competition.Midtjylland have been strong in Europe, winning 12 of their last 14 matches.Forest went close in the first half, with Omari Hutchinson’s 30-yard shot tipped over by Elias Rafn Olafsson. Elliot Anderson also forced a fine save, and Philip Billing cleared a potential own goal from Pedro Bravo off the line.In heavy rain, Forest lost their footing in the 80th minute, allowing Ousmane Diao’s cross to find Cho, who calmly headed past Matz Sels to seal the win."It is difficult to explain. We created so many chances to score.Even if we were to draw, it would not have been fair," Pereira said."They had two chances, and they scored. But we had enough time and the game was there. Even the rain played against us!"At the Stade Pierre-Mauroy, Ollie Watkins scored his first goal in eight games across all competitions, giving Aston Villa a 1-0 lead and putting them on track for the quarter-finals.The England international’s second-half goal was only his ninth of a tough season, with just two goals in his last 13 matches. He scored in the 61st minute, meeting Emiliano Buendia’s flick-on with a looping header over Lille goalkeeper Berke Ozer.Thanks to Watkins, Unai Emery’s team—who beat Lille in the 2024 UEFA Conference League quarter-finals—go into the second leg at Villa Park as favourites to advance.Villa have won eight of their nine Europa League games this season as they push to end a 30-year trophy drought.A Crucial EncounterAston Villa, managed by Unai Emery, had struggled recently, losing to bottom-placed Wolves and suffering a 4-1 defeat against Chelsea.However, the win over Lille was a big confidence boost ahead of a crucial match against Manchester United on Sunday in the fight for Champions League qualification.The victory also marked Emery’s 100th win as Aston Villa manager."Ollie is working and being consistent with his task," Emery said. "The most important thing is how we played a serious match."We know how difficult it is with the atmosphere they have here."Brazil striker Endrick salvaged a 1-1 draw for Lyon at 10-man Celta Vigo.Celta's Javier Rueda swept in Williot Swedberg's cross in the 25th minute.But the Spanish side had Borja Iglesias sent off for a second booking in the 54th minute.And Lyon escaped thanks to on-loan Real Madrid teenager Endrick, whose shot from the edge of the area in the 87th minute was fumbled over the line by Celta keeper Ionut Radu.Roma's Lorenzo Pellegrini rescued a 1-1 draw in the all-Italian showdown at Bologna.Fifth-placed Roma, 12 points above eighth-placed Bologna in Serie A, fell behind when Federico Bernardeschi struck in the 50th minute with a clinical finish from Jonathan Rowe's assist.Pellegrini came off the bench to haul Roma level in the 71st minute, tapping in from Donyell Malen's pass.Portuguese league leaders Porto won 2-1 at Stuttgart and Genk beat Freiburg 1-0 in Belgium.Ferencvaros defeated Sporting Braga 2-0 in Budapest, while Panathinaikos earned a shock 1-0 home win against Real Betis.
Article Summary: Nottingham Forest lose 1-0 to Midtjylland in Europa League last-16 first leg. Cho Gue-sung's late header gives Danish side second win over Forest this season. Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins scores first goal in eight games against Lille. Brazil striker Endrick salvages 1-1 draw for Lyon at 10-man Celta Vigo.

Article Title: GMR Sports expresses interest in AIFF commercial rights tender
Article Text:
Manisha of India scores a goal during the AFC Women's Asian Cup Australia 2026 match between India and Chinese Taipei at Western Sydney Stadium on March 10, 2026 in Sydney, Australia. (Photo by Mark Metcalfe/Getty Images)

New Delhi:

'Indian cricket no less than Bollywood abroad' | Bombay Sport Exchange

Poll Do you believe a 15+5 year commercial rights cycle will benefit Indian football? Yes No

Poll Which company do you think will win the commercial rights tender from AIFF? GMR Sports FanCode Capri Sports None of the above



For the complete match list, venues, and timings, check the full

For the complete match list, venues, and timings, check the full IPL 2026 schedule , fixtures, and team-wise match dates here.

GMR Sports has expressed interest in the commercial rights tender floated by the All India Football Federation (AIFF) for the men's and women's football club competitions. FanCode and Capri Sports (part of Capri Global) are the other two parties that have also shown interest in the proposed 15+5-year commercial rights cycle.It is learnt that Capri Sports' interest is in the women's tournaments under the packages offered by the AIFF.AIFF are hoping to sell the commercial rights for the competitions for a minimum of 15 years. If the bidders agree, it can be extended to 20 years.The commercial rights, part of AIFF's Vision 2047, include two packages: Package A ( Indian Super League and Federation Cup) and Package B (Indian Women's League, Indian Women's League 2 and possibly the Women's Federation Cup).GMR Sports are involved with multiple sporting properties: Delhi Capitals (IPL franchise), Dubai Capitals (ILT20 franchise), India Capitals (Legends League Cricket franchise), UP Yoddhas (Pro Kabaddi League franchise), Telugu Yoddhas (Kho Kho franchise), Seattle Orcas (Major League Cricket franchise), Southern Brave (The Hundred franchise), Hampshire Cricket, the Utilita Bowl stadium and the Rugby Premier League.After releasing the Request for Proposal (RFP) on March 2, interested parties were required to pay Rs 2.5 lakh for the tender document. The interested parties then attended the pre-bid conference on March 11.The last date for bid submissions is March 19 and the bids (technical and commercial) will be opened on March 20.AIFF's previous attempt to sell the commercial rights found no takers in November. However, that came against the backdrop of uncertainty related to the ISL, which eventually started after a five-month delay on February 14.The 2025-26 ISL season is currently being played in a truncated format and needed intervention from the Sports Minister to get the ball rolling. All 14 teams agreed to play the season, which will witness 91 matches on a home-and-away basis.Earlier, global broadcast rights for the ISL were sold to FanCode for Rs 8.62 crore, which further sub-licensed them to the Sony Sports Network. Meanwhile, Kaleidoscope Production and Services (KPS Studios) was awarded the production rights, both global and domestic.
Article Summary: AIFF are hoping to sell the commercial rights for the competitions for a minimum of 15 years. If the bidders agree, it can be extended to 20 years. The last date for bid submissions is March 19 and the bids (technical and commercial) will be opened on March 20.

Article Title: Jaxson Dart’s girlfriend Marissa Ayers turns heads with bold bikini top look during dreamy Florida “sweet escape” getaway
Article Text:
Jaxson Dart (left); Marissa Ayers. (Maddie Meyer/Getty; Marissa Ayers/Instagram)

Marissa Ayers steals spotlight in sunset Florida snaps as Jaxson Dart’s girlfriend flaunts toned physique in style



Jaxson Dart's girlfriend Marissa Ayers is once again drawing attention, this time under a fading Florida sunset that felt almost staged for the moment. The New York Giants quarterback’s partner shared a series of photos that leaned into soft light and bold styling, offering a glimpse of both her modeling work and her growing public profile. It was simple, striking, and timed just right.Ayers wore a halter-neck bikini top with a deep neckline, matched with a mini-skirt that moved easily in the breeze. Gold hoop earrings, a thick cuff bracelet, and strappy sandals added a polished touch. Her hair, pulled into a high ponytail, kept the focus on the clean lines of the look. “Sweet Escape,” she wrote in the caption, letting the setting do the rest.The Florida shoot was not just a casual getaway. Ayers was there for a modeling project with Australian label Outcast Clothing, a detail that adds context to the carefully framed images.It also continues a steady run of high-visibility appearances that have shaped her rise over the past year.Just days earlier, she shared photos from the Bahamas, posing in a turquoise blue string bikini from White Fox while standing alongside pigs on the beach. The setting felt playful, and Dart joined in. “Do you like my coconuts?” he wrote in the comments. He followed that with “Unbelievable!! More plz! 😎.” Then, in a lighter moment, he added, “I see 🥓.”The exchange offered a small window into their dynamic, easygoing and a bit unfiltered.Ayers’ growing spotlight did not begin here. She first caught wide attention as a ring card girl for Most Valuable Promotions, the boxing venture founded by Jake Paul. Her presence during the Katie Taylor and Amanda Serrano rematch in July, streamed on Netflix, pushed her into wider conversation. Another spike followed in December during the Jake Paul and Anthony Joshua fight card, where social media did much of the amplifying.Her relationship with Dart has unfolded just as publicly, though with a different tone. They made it official on January 9, when Ayers posted a carousel of photos that included quiet moments, travel snapshots, and date nights. “Rumor has it…” she wrote, tagging Dart. He replied with “My peach,” a short line that quickly picked up traction.The timeline leading up to that reveal had its own hints. They were first linked after being seen together at a Halloween party in Manhattan. In early December, Ayers was spotted on the sidelines during a Giants and Patriots game, seated alongside Dart’s mother, Kara. By early February, they had made their red carpet debut at the 2026 NFL Honors in San Francisco. Ayers wore a metallic gold gown, while Dart chose a custom espresso-toned suit, joined by his parents, Brandon and Kara.On the field, Dart’s rookie season brought its own story. He finished with 2,275 passing yards and 15 touchdowns, enough to earn a place among finalists for the AP Offensive Rookie of the Year award. The honor ultimately went to Panthers wide receiver Tetairoa McMillan, but Dart’s year still set a clear foundation.Away from the numbers, moments like these continue to shape how fans see him. Not just as a quarterback building his career, but as someone whose life beyond the game is unfolding in real time, one post at a time.
Article Summary: New York Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart's girlfriend Marissa Ayers shared a series of photos. She wore a halter-neck bikini top with a deep neckline, matched with a mini-skirt that moved easily in the breeze. Ayers was there for a modeling project with Australian label Outcast Clothing.

Article Title: Travis Kelce contract details: Chiefs pull off clever financial move with unusual $40 million dummy year
Article Text:
Travis Kelce contract details (Getty Images)

Travis Kelce contract details explain why Chiefs structured a low-risk, high-control deal

Travis Kelce contract details are finally out, and they tell a deeper story than a simple one-year return to the Kansas City Chiefs. The deal keeps Travis Kelce in red and gold for the 2026 season, but it also reflects a franchise trying to steady itself after an unfamiliar stumble. For the first time in over a decade, Kansas City missed the playoffs. That context matters. So does Kelce’s choice to stay when he could have explored free agency.There was real thought about stepping away. At 36, after a long run of dominance, Kelce had little left to prove. Yet he chose continuity over change, returning to support Patrick Mahomes and a roster looking to reset. The contract, modest on the surface, carries layers that reveal both caution and intent from the front office.The numbers begin simply. Kelce signed a one-year, $12 million fully guaranteed deal, with the potential to reach $15 million through incentives tied to performance and team success. But the structure is where it gets interesting.Only $3 million comes as base salary. The remaining $9 million is built through roster bonuses, including a $3 million training camp bonus and $6 million tied to his presence on the 90-man roster at various points.That detail stands out. It means Kelce earns the bulk of his money regardless of weekly game status, a rare level of protection for a player at this stage of his career.Kansas City clearly values more than production. Leadership, continuity, and trust carry weight here. Even in a 2025 season where Kelce posted 851 yards and five touchdowns, he still earned his 11th straight Pro Bowl nod. The numbers may have dipped from his peak, but his influence has not.Behind the scenes, the Chiefs leaned on financial engineering to manage their cap. The deal includes so-called dummy years in 2027 and 2028, allowing the team to spread out a $10.6 million restructure bonus. As a result, Kelce’s 2026 cap hit drops to just under $4.9 million, giving the front office room to address other needs.Then comes the twist. A $40 million guarantee tied to the 2028 season activates if Kelce remains on the roster past June 8, 2027. In reality, it functions as a deadline. The Chiefs will almost certainly move on or see Kelce retire before that date, using post-June 1 rules to soften the financial impact.It is a practical setup. Clean, flexible, and honest about the timeline ahead.Kelce’s return lands at a critical moment. Kansas City closed last season at 6-11, with Mahomes sidelined late after an ACL injury. The slide exposed cracks, but it also clarified priorities. Stability matters, especially when a core piece is working his way back.For now, Kelce remains exactly where he has always been. Not just a target in the passing game, but a bridge between what the Chiefs were and what they hope to be again.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce signed a one-year, $12 million fully guaranteed deal, with the potential to reach $15 million through incentives. At 36, after a long run of dominance, Kelce had little left to prove. He chose continuity over change, returning to support Patrick Mahomes and a roster looking to reset.

Article Title: Stefon Diggs’ ex K'Yanna Barber shares son’s birth timeline amid Cardi B breakup and cheating claims

K'Yanna Barber shares touching message about her son with Stefon Diggs

Off-field headlines have followed Stefon Diggs almost as closely as his career moves in recent months. The veteran receiver, who once starred for the Buffalo Bills and later joined the New England Patriots, has found himself at the center of intense social media discussion about his growing family. Much of that chatter resurfaced this week after one of his former partners shared a personal update about their child.The post came from K'Yanna Barber, who offered fans a rare glimpse into her life with the child she shares with Diggs. The caption was short, but it immediately caught fans’ attention because it confirmed both the baby’s age and his name."6 perfect months with you. I love you Colmy <3," she wrote in the caption.The message suggested the child was born around September 15, giving followers a clearer timeline of the arrival. Barber has occasionally shared glimpses of her life as a mother on social media, including a public appearance earlier this year when she attended Super Bowl LX with the child dressed in Patriots colors.That outing sparked conversation among fans who noticed the timing. The artist later confirmed the birth but chose not to reveal the child’s name publicly.Reports about their relationship soon took a dramatic turn. His eldest daughter Nova was born in 2016, and another child, Shiloh, arrived in 2023.Together, those developments have kept Diggs’ personal life firmly in the spotlight, even as fans continue to follow his next steps on the football field.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Cowboys may turn to proven 2-time Super Bowl champion to fix CB depth issue after frustrating release decision
Article Text:
Cowboys trade rumors (Getty Images)

Cowboys CB depth move: why L’Jarius Sneed fits the need now

Cowboys CB depth gamble could ease draft pressure

Dallas Cowboys have made it clear this offseason that fixing the defense is no longer optional. It had to happen. After a year where stops were rare and confidence even rarer, the front office has spent the past week patching holes with urgency. The results are mixed, and some moves carry questions, but one thing is certain. This unit looks more competitive today than it did at the end of last season.There is still work to be done, though. With two first-round picks sitting at No. 12 and No. 20, the Cowboys have flexibility, but also pressure. Both Jerry Jones and Stephen Jones have hinted at using those picks in a trade. At the same time, relying too heavily on rookies to fix structural issues can backfire.That leaves veteran free agency as a logical bridge.Cornerback remains one of the more delicate spots on the roster, and this is where L'Jarius Sneed enters the conversation. Recently released by the Tennessee Titans, Sneed suddenly becomes a low-risk option with a high ceiling. The timing matters. Dallas needs help now, not just potential later.Sneed’s résumé carries weight. A two-time Super Bowl winner with the Kansas City Chiefs, he built his reputation on physical coverage and big-game poise.Yet his recent stretch has been uneven. Injuries limited him to just 12 games over the past two seasons, and he is still working his way back from a quad issue. Titans GM Mike Borgonzi summed it up plainly: “Frustrating for him. But he’s continued to work and get himself healthy. ”That uncertainty is exactly why this could work in Dallas. The cost will not be overwhelming, and the upside is easy to see.Dallas does not need Sneed to be perfect. It needs him to be available and reliable in stretches. Right now, the cornerback group carries more questions than answers. DaRon Bland remains a key piece, but health is not guaranteed. Shavon Revel Jr. is still developing after a difficult 2025 season following his return from an ACL injury. Depth, not star power, is the priority here.That is why voices around the team see logic in the move. Analyst Adam Schultz put it simply: “Yes, the Cowboys already have Cobie Durant to go with DaRon Bland and Shavon Revel Jr., but Sneed’s experience could prove invaluable. Plus, he won’t break the bank, given that he was released. Dallas can get him in at cost. But will they want to?“I say a phone call at least has to be made.”It is not a move that guarantees anything. It is a calculated swing. But for a team trying to avoid forcing draft picks into immediate roles, that kind of swing might be necessary. Sometimes the smartest roster decisions are the quiet ones that buy time.
Article Summary: L'Jarius Sneed was recently released by the Tennessee Titans. Sneed is a two- time Super Bowl winner with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Cowboys already have Cobie Durant, DaRon Bland and Shavon Revel Jr.

Article Title: “It was just hard”: Chloe Kim says her success scared men off before Myles Garrett romance
Article Text:
Olympic snowboarder Chloe Kim revealed that her relationship with Myles Garrett began after she vented about dating struggles to a mutual friend working in athlete therapy. During X Games preparations, Kim jokingly said she might stay single and use a sperm donor. The friend asked her ideal partner traits and later connected her with Garrett.

Chloe Kim opens up about past relationship struggles before finding happiness with Myles Garrett

Olympic snowboarding star Chloe Kim has spent much of her life in the spotlight, but success did not make her dating life easier. Long before her relationship with Myles Garrett began, the two-time Olympic champion says romance often came with complications that had little to do with love and everything to do with fame.On the Not Skinny But Not Fat podcast, Kim talked honestly about how her early successes and growing fame put a strain on her past relationships. The snowboarder said some partners struggled with the imbalance created by her success, something she never intended to make an issue but often felt became one anyway.Kim explained that the challenges started as her career rapidly took off in her early twenties. By that time, she had already built an impressive life and career that few people her age could match.“I think there was a weird dynamic shift where it’s like, I have my own house that I bought when I was 21. I have all these things, and I’m always busy — people know who I am, I have followers on Instagram,” she said.Despite her achievements, Kim insisted she never viewed relationships through the lens of status or success. Instead, she hoped for a partner who could simply understand the pressures that came with her career.“… It was just hard. Also, I felt just like they didn’t understand what I was going through either. … I just want someone to not be intimidated by me and my success because I don’t carry myself in that way. I’m not looking at you and being like, ‘Oh you suck, because I’m better than you.’ I’m trying to be respectful myself and like you as a person but I feel like that’s not being appreciated, and I’m kind of just catching strays for no reason. So I was just so over it.”At one point, Kim said her frustration peaked during the 2025 X Games when she vented to her physical therapist about giving up on dating entirely.“I was like, ‘I can’t date anymore. I’m done, I’m just going to be single forever,'” Kim recalled. “I was being so dramatic [saying], ‘I’m going to get a sperm donor, I don’t need a man. I just want kids and I’m going to live happy and free.’”That conversation unexpectedly led to a turning point. Her therapist, who knew Garrett, introduced the pair. The connection quickly grew, and the Cleveland Browns star later traveled to Italy to support Kim during the 2026 Winter Olympics, where she captured a silver medal despite competing with a torn labrum in her shoulder.Today, the couple appears stronger than ever, proving that sometimes the right person arrives when you least expect it.
Article Summary: Olympic snowboarder Chloe Kim revealed that her relationship with Myles Garrett began after she vented about dating struggles to a mutual friend working in athlete therapy. Kim jokingly said she might stay single and use a sperm donor during X Games preparations. The friend asked her ideal partner traits and later connected her with Garrett.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys could shockingly move $6M star receiver despite franchise tag speculation
Article Text:
Trade speculation continues around a star Cowboys receiver despite the team placing the franchise tag on him for the 2026 season. Some analysts suggest Dallas could trade him to avoid a contract holdout, possibly for a second-round pick. However, many believe that price is far too low given his recent production, making a deal unlikely for now.

Cowboys linked to surprising blockbuster move involving elite playmaker George Pickens

George Pickens’ future has become a key offseason storyline for the Dallas Cowboys. Although free agency has taken center stage, uncertainty around the star receiver’s long-term contract remains. Dallas placed the franchise tag on Pickens, which would pay him about $27 million in 2026 and signals the team still values him as a major offensive weapon. Still, trade speculation continues to surface.Ideally, both sides want a long-term deal that would remove uncertainty and help Dallas manage its salary cap while creating more financial flexibility to strengthen the roster around defensive coordinator Christian Parker’s system.A lot of people are confused by the idea that the Dallas Cowboys would trade Pickens, especially after his great 2025 season. The receiver had 1,429 yards and nine touchdowns, making him one of the league's most productive playmakers. People are skeptical about the idea that Dallas might trade him for just a second-round draft pick because of how well he has played.Bleacher Report analyst Moe Moton recently floated a scenario in which Pickens could be sent to the New England Patriots.His reasoning centers on the possibility of a contract standoff following the franchise tag."According to Ian Rapoport, Pickens won't report to the Cowboys' facilities without a new deal after the club franchise-tagged him,” Moton wrote. "To avoid a potential holdout situation, Dallas can ship Pickens off to the New England Patriots, who have been heavily linked to wide receiver A.J. Brown in the rumor mill."Rapoport believes the Cowboys would accept a second-round pick for Pickens, which is a fair price for the Patriots if he becomes their go-to pass-catcher over Romeo Doubs."Still, the math behind the franchise tag complicates that theory. The designation essentially values George Pickens at two first-round picks in compensation if another team attempted to sign him. That makes the idea of Dallas settling for only a second-round return difficult to justify.Beyond the numbers, moving Pickens would dramatically change the Dallas Cowboys' offensive structure. Without him, Dak Prescott would rely heavily on CeeDee Lamb and Ryan Flournoy as primary targets, a scenario that would significantly reduce the unit’s explosiveness..For now, the most realistic outcome remains simple. George Pickens likely stays in the Dallas Dallas for the 2026 season while contract discussions continue in the background. Until then, the speculation will keep swirling, even if the Cowboys appear far from ready to part with one of their most dangerous weapons.
Article Summary: Dallas placed the franchise tag on Pickens, which would pay him about $27 million in 2026. Some analysts suggest Dallas could trade him to avoid a contract holdout, possibly for a second-round pick. Many believe that price is far too low given his recent production.

Article Title: Could Hailee Steinfeld’s due date cause trouble for Josh Allen’s early Bills preparations?
Article Text:
Hailee Steinfeld and Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen are expecting their first child soon, with signs pointing to a possible March due date. The timing could affect Allen’s early offseason schedule with the Bills, including optional workouts. While the team prepares for spring activities, Allen has made it clear that becoming a father is a moment he values deeply.

Josh Allen’s offseason could change as Hailee Steinfeld’s due date approaches

The Buffalo Bills may soon have more than football on Josh Allen ’s mind. As the NFL offseason unfolds, a major life moment is approaching for the star quarterback and his wife, actor Hailee Steinfeld . The couple are expecting their first child, and recent hints suggest the arrival could be right around the corner. With the Bills’ offseason program beginning soon, the timing could quietly shape how Allen approaches the early weeks of preparation.Steinfeld’s pregnancy has drawn fresh attention in recent weeks, especially as her film Sinners continues to dominate headlines during awards season. But while the spotlight remains fixed on the actress and her growing baby bump, football fans are also watching closely. If the baby arrives soon, Allen could temporarily step away from early offseason activities as he embraces a new and deeply personal chapter of his life.Neither Allen nor Steinfeld has publicly confirmed the exact due date. Still, clues shared by the couple and outside observers suggest the wait may not be long. USA Today reporter Robert Zeglinski recently speculated that the timeline points toward a March arrival.“Outside of a social media post here and there (they revealed Steinfeld was pregnant in mid-December), Allen and Steinfeld have been appropriately cryptic about their baby plans,” Zeglinski wrote.“In a beautiful family moment like this, privacy is obviously of the utmost importance. Everyone knows that. Fans have speculated that Allen and Steinfeld waited until at least the second trimester (roughly weeks 14-27) to reveal that they were expecting. That would place a potential due date around some time in March 2026, which feels very soon!”Steinfeld first displayed her baby bump publicly during the Golden Globe Awards in January. Her appearance quickly sparked online discussion about how far along the pregnancy might be. Later, the couple shared images from a maternity photo shoot, offering fans another glimpse into the joyful moment they are preparing for.If the baby arrives in March, Allen could miss some voluntary offseason team activities scheduled in April. Those sessions are optional, and the quarterback has previously skipped parts of the program. Last year he stepped away briefly as he and Steinfeld celebrated their wedding in May.Allen has made it clear that fatherhood now sits at the center of his priorities.“I’ve got siblings that have kids, I’ve got a lot of friends that have kids. I don’t know if you can plan too far in advance,” Allen said. “So I’m very much looking forward to that with my wife, of becoming a dad. It’s something that I will take with great pride. And we’re going to have to figure things out on the go, just like anything else.”He continued with a sentiment that shows how meaningful the moment is for him.“But this is the most important thing I’ll ever be in my life, being a dad,” Allen said. “And I know I love being a football player, and I love being a quarterback for the Buffalo Bills. But I’m looking forward to this one.”
Article Summary: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen and his wife are expecting their first child soon. Hailee Steinfeld's pregnancy has drawn fresh attention as her film Sinners continues to dominate headlines. The timing could affect Allen's early offseason schedule with the Bills, including optional workouts.

Article Title: “I had to be hospitalized”: Cardi B opens up about what she experienced after being cheated on as Stefon Diggs tries to rekindle romance
Article Text:
Cardi B opens up about what she experienced after being cheated on as Stefon Diggs tries to rekindle romance.(Image via CBS, Getty Images)

Cardi B details what she went through as Stefon Diggs tries to rekindle romance with her



Did Stefon Diggs cheat on Cardi B when she was pregnant?



Stefon Diggs, the popular wide receiver in the league, is facing a tough time in his career after the New England Patriots released him recently, as fans continue to troll him for allegedly cheating on Cardi B.Both Cardi B and Stefon Diggs have remained silent about what really led to their high profile dramatic break up. Amid all the mess, Cardi B’s heartbreaking statements show what she really went through in her life.A few months ago, as Cardi B spoke to her fans on X Spaces, she detailed what she went through in her seven year long marriage to the “Migos” rapper, Offset.Cardi B said, “It’s more than just cheating…”The popular Grammy winner added, “That’s the thing that y’all don’t understand.Y’all don’t know half of the sh*t. Y’all don’t know most of the sh*t.”The “Am I the Drama?” artist continued, “It’s more than just cheating. It was a lot. I couldn’t take it no more. I had to go to a f**king hospital because I couldn’t take it no more.”In the seven years that Cardi B was married to Offset, the two had three children and faced a number of cheating accusations.Though Cardi B used to shut down all such rumors, Offset recently admitted in public about how he has cheated on the Grammy winner with different women multiple times throughout their seven year long marriage.Back in October 2024, when Cardi B left Offset and filed for divorce, fans rooted for her and Stefon Diggs’ future together.As luck would have it, Cardi B and the former New England Patriots’ star player, Stefon Diggs’ high profile relationship was full of cheating accusations as he was sued by women for paternity lawsuits.While Cardi B went public about her love and commitment towards Stefon Diggs, he was fighting sexual assault cases lodged against him.Though Cardi B defended her relationship with Stefon Diggs for a pretty long time, she ended up breaking off things with him just hours before he took the field for Super Bowl LX.As per reports, Stefon Diggs has reportedly tried every possible way to rekindle romance with Cardi B but she has been firm about not getting back together.
Article Summary: Stefon Diggs, the popular wide receiver in the league, is facing a tough time in his career after the New England Patriots released him recently. Fans continue to troll him for allegedly cheating on Cardi B. Both the Grammy winner and the former Patriots player have remained silent about what really led to their high profile dramatic break up.
